2606.17034.title: KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing
2606.17034.paper_summary: Post-hoc context erasing over the KV cache is challenging because a local edit has a global consequence: once a span has been processed, its influence propagates into the cached states of all subsequent tokens. This issue arises naturally in long-context LLM applications, where stale retrieved facts, incorrect tool observations, retracted user preferences, or harmful prompt injections may be identified only after prefill. Exact erasing must then recompute all tokens after the deleted span, making its computational cost depend on suffix length rather than erased-span length. We introduce KVEraser, a learned KV-cache editing method for efficient localized context erasing. Given a processed context and a span to remove, KVEraser replaces only the KV states of the erased interval with learned steering states while reusing the remaining cache unchanged. To learn a transferable erasing mechanism, we build a two-stage training pipeline: generic span-neighbor pre-training teaches the eraser to suppress the influence of the erased span, while task-specific fine-tuning adapts this capability to downstream scenarios. Experiments show that KVEraser nearly matches full recomputation in post-erasure performance on in-domain tasks across 1K--32K context lengths, while its latency increases by only 24% compared with a 17.6x increase for full recomputation. KVEraser also generalizes to unseen long-document QA tasks with harmful factual distractors, achieving the best performance among approximate baselines with a 3--4x speedup over full recomputation.
2606.17034.paper_summary_zh: 後置上下文刪除在KV快取上是具有挑戰性的，因為局部編輯具有全球性影響：一旦一個範圍被處理，其影響會傳播到所有後續標記的快取狀態中。這個問題在長上下文LLM應用中自然出現，其中陳舊的檢索事實、不正確的工具觀察、撤回的用戶偏好或有害的提示注入可能僅在預填充後被識別。精確的刪除必須重新計算所有在刪除範圍之後的標記，使其計算成本依賴於後綴長度而不是刪除範圍的長度。我們引入了KVEraser，一種學習的KV快取編輯方法，用於高效的局部上下文刪除。給定一個處理過的上下文和一個要移除的範圍，KVEraser僅用學習到的引導狀態替換被刪除區間的KV狀態，同時保持其餘快取不變。為了學習可轉移的刪除機制，我們建立了一個兩階段的訓練流程：通用範圍鄰居預訓練教會刪除器抑制被刪除範圍的影響，而特定任務的微調則將這一能力適應於下游場景。實驗顯示，KVEraser在1K到32K上下文長度的域內任務中，幾乎達到了完整重新計算的後刪除性能，而其延遲僅增加了24%，相比之下，完整重新計算的延遲增加了17.6倍。KVEraser還能夠泛化到未見的長文檔QA任務中，並且在有害的事實干擾者中實現了最佳性能，相比於完整重新計算，其速度提高了3到4倍。
2606.17034.author: Mufei Li et.al.
2606.17034.authors: Mufei Li, Shikun Liu, Dongqi Fu, Haoyu Wang, Yinglong Xia, Hong Li, Hong Yan, Pan Li
